chapter.label: Tale 131
chapter.title: The life of abba zachaios of holy SION

paragraphs.text: A pagan Saracen® told this to the inhabitants of Clisma <=Suez> Procopios the lawyer,* who came from Porphyredn, told us this and to us; about Abba Zachaios: 1 went to the mountain of Abba Anthony to hunt. As I went along, There was a deadly plague in Caesarea and I was very worried that 1 saw a monk on the mountain holding a book and reading. I went my children might die. I did not know what to do. Should I send up to him intending to rob him; perhaps to slay him too. As 1 and bring them home? No man can (lee {rom the wrath of God. approached him, he stretched out his right hand towards me saying: Should I leave them there? They might die without me seeing them. “Stay"t And for two nights and two days I was unable to move from Not knowing what wes best to be done, I said: T will go to Abba that spot. Then I said to him: ‘For the love of the God whom you Zachaios and whatever he says, that will I do”. So T went to Holy worship, let me go’! He said: ‘Go in peace’, and thus I was able to Sion (which is where he was always to be found), but I did not find leave the place where I was. him, I came into the inner court [of the Church of Saint Mary the
